title: Qualifications for Republic of Korea Special Work :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Qualifications for Republic of Korea Special Work
To apply for a visa under the Republic of Korea Special Work Instructions, you’ll need to have the necessary qualifications and/or practical experience to work in an occupation that’s considered special work under the Republic of Korea Special Work Instructions.
The specific qualifications and/or experience you’ll need to be granted a visa under the Republic of Korea Special Work Instructions will depend on your occupation.
The qualifications you need will be listed under your occupation type.
- You must have either: a Washington Accord accredited undergraduate engineering degree that is relevant to the job you’ve been offered a Bachelor of Engineering or an equivalent qualification.
You must have either:
- a Washington Accord accredited undergraduate engineering degree that is relevant to the job you’ve been offered
- a Bachelor of Engineering or an equivalent qualification.
- You must have both: a Bachelor of Food Science or an equivalent qualification at least 3 years’ industry work experience after you became qualified.
- a Bachelor of Food Science or an equivalent qualification
- at least 3 years’ industry work experience after you became qualified.
- You must have a Bachelor of Forestry Science or equivalent.
You must have a Bachelor of Forestry Science or equivalent.
- You must have a Certificate of Korean Language Teaching issued by the Minister of Culture, Sports and Tourism.
You must have a Certificate of Korean Language Teaching issued by the Minister of Culture, Sports and Tourism.
- You must have a Valid Tour Guide Licence issued by and registered with, either: the Korea Tourism Organization the Korea Tourism Association (entrusted by the Minister of Culture, Sports and Tourism).
You must have a Valid Tour Guide Licence issued by and registered with, either:
- the Korea Tourism Organization
- the Korea Tourism Association (entrusted by the Minister of Culture, Sports and Tourism).
- You must have at least 3 years’ specialised work experience in film animation.
You must have at least 3 years’ specialised work experience in film animation.
- You must have Taekwondo certificate that’s recognised by Kukkiwon (World Taekwondo Headquarters) as grade 4 or above.
You must have Taekwondo certificate that’s recognised by Kukkiwon (World Taekwondo Headquarters) as grade 4 or above.
- You must have a Korean Medicine Doctor license issued by the Minister of Health and Welfare.
You must have a Korean Medicine Doctor license issued by the Minister of Health and Welfare.
- You must have a Bachelor of Engineering or an equivalent qualification.
You must have a Bachelor of Engineering or an equivalent qualification.
- You must have both: a Bachelor of Veterinary Science or an equivalent qualificaiton New Zealand registration with the Veterinary Council of New Zealand. For information on New Zealand registration, contact: Veterinary Council of New Zealand
- a Bachelor of Veterinary Science or an equivalent qualificaiton
- New Zealand registration with the Veterinary Council of New Zealand.
For information on New Zealand registration, contact:
Veterinary Council of New Zealand
